sentences.text: Thank you for calling Berkshire residential Investments. If you know, the extension of the party you are trying to reach you may enter it at any time. Otherwise, please press five to access the first name directory press two to access the last name directory enter the first few letters of the person's last name followed by the pound key for Q press seven. For Z press nine to exit the name directory press the star key. One that was found for Brandon morning Veronica press one for the previous menu. Hornbrook Brandon is currently unavailable. Please leave a message after the tone. When you have finished please hang up or press the pound key for more options.

Hey Brandon, this is Jordan, giving you a call from a photo dot. Com. Hey, I just wanted to follow up with you emails. I sent you last week regarding our new partnership with Knox. C R M um love to discuss either that or just are advertising Services in general, if you'd like to return my call you can reach me at six zero eight two two five one eight zero again. My number is six zero eight two two five one eight eight zero and I'll send over a quick email is follow, up as well thanks Brandon.
